compounds.frequency: weekly starting dose, increasing +1mg per week every month

benefits.description: Describes people in circle losing weight and maintaining for ~6 months after weaning off

protocol_notes: Advises starting at 1mg tirzepatide, increasing +1mg/week each month, targeting ~0.5 lb loss every few weeks. Recommends weaning off at same pace. Prefers tirz over sema for muscle preservation due to GIP agonism.
